title: References: Guidelines for MPH Programs in Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## Guidelines for MPH Programs in Canada
- Public Health Human Resources Task Group. Guidelines for MPH programs in Canada. Public Health Agency of Canada, 2006.
- Moloughney BW. Development of practicum guidelines for MPH programs: Preliminary report. Prepared for Public Health Agency of Canada, 2007.
- ASPH Council of Public Health Practice Coordinators. Demonstrating excellence in practice-based teaching for public health. ASPH, 2004.
- Council on Education for Public Health. Accreditation criteria: Public health programs. Washington: CEPH, 2005.
- Public Health Sciences, University of Toronto. MHSc Community Health and Epidemiology - Practicum. 2006. Available at www.phs.utoronto.ca/mhsc_comm_healthepi3.asp. Accessed: 6-6-2007.
- Master's Program in Health Sciences. Practicum guide for students 2006-07. Simon Fraser University, Faculty of Health Sciences, 2007.
- College of Public Health UoO. Guidelines for public health practicum. Oklahoma City, Oklahoma: 2005.
- University of New Mexico School of Medicine. Master's in public health practicum handbook. Albuquerque: University of New Mexico, 2007.
